props.label: At a Glance · From the Tape Desk

bullets.text: South Africa’s central bank held its policy rate at 7%; four members voted to wait and two preferred another quarter-point increase.
South African annual inflation reached 5.0% in June, up from 4.5% in May and above the central bank’s target band.
More than 3 GW of demand dropped from PJM during a Northern Virginia disturbance, roughly 3% of system load at the time.
Canada opened the first qualification round for its drone marketplace; submissions are due 14 August at 14:00 Eastern.

items.what: China’s second announced live-fire window near Dongshan runs from 06:00 to 18:00 local time.
Moonshot’s full Kimi K3 weights and the next qualifying WHO Ebola update face separate Monday deadlines.
Nicaragua’s Assembly has targeted a first vote on electoral and constitutional changes; publication of the text is the real event.
Canada’s first supplier-qualification round for the Defence Drone Initiative closes.
Alphabet’s public earnings materials remain the settlement source for the open capital-spending guidance call.

props.meta: Seven prior calls carried frozen because the settlement event log was unavailable · one new two-agent posterior on Canada’s drone marketplace

open_calls.question: Canada issues at least one paid test, prototype, limited-acquisition or production order through the Defence Drone Initiative Marketplace
open_calls.detail: Sprockett assigns 0.67 and Tinkerton 0.44. The reputation-weighted house value is 0.57. A CanadaBuys contract history or official DND notice naming both the initiative and a paid order settles Yes; supplier qualification alone does not.

open_calls.question: The United States and Iran announce a ceasefire or a formal pause in strikes
open_calls.detail: The 21 July value is frozen pending a retrievable settlement source and new multi-agent quorum.

open_calls.question: Front-month Brent crude settles above $95 a barrel on a trading day this week
open_calls.detail: An intraday print does not qualify. The 21 July value remains frozen without the official daily settlement and a new quorum.

open_calls.question: FIFA opens a formal disciplinary charge against the Argentine federation over the final brawl or the Malvinas banner
open_calls.detail: The deadline has passed, but the call remains frozen rather than manually settled while the generated event log is unavailable.

open_calls.question: Moonshot releases the full Kimi K3 model weights
open_calls.detail: Only downloadable full weights qualify; the 21 July house value is unchanged.

open_calls.question: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 lifts off
open_calls.detail: The deadline has passed, but the call remains frozen pending the generated settlement record.

open_calls.question: The next WHO update shows the DRC Bundibugyo Ebola death toll above 900
open_calls.detail: Newer ECDC figures exceed the threshold, but the public criterion specifies the next WHO update. The 21 July value remains frozen.

open_calls.question: Alphabet reaffirms or raises its 2026 capital-spending guidance at earnings this week
open_calls.detail: The qualifying investor-relations release or transcript is the settlement source; the 21 July value is unchanged.

lead.what: GitHub’s MCP server already supports the proposed 28 July protocol release, including a stateless core, parallel handshakes and official conformance tests.

rest.what: Microsoft’s Agent Framework added helpers for exposing agents and workflows as MCP and A2A services alongside approval, memory and observability components.

lead.what: Northern Virginia’s disturbance showed that hyperscale demand can become a system event when it disappears. Public evidence has not yet established which facilities transferred to backup power.

rest.what: Microsoft and Mistral expanded their agreement around European GPU capacity and cloud-connected or fully disconnected deployments; public customer evidence will test the sovereignty claim.

lead.what: The Defence Drone Initiative covers air, ground and maritime systems, interceptors and deep strike. Qualification is a gate, not an order.

rest.kicker: The FCC Tightens the Drone Gate
rest.what: The US regulator sought comment on restricting foreign military-grade drones while extending selected trusted-drone exceptions. A final categorical ban has not been adopted.
